zh.lifeSummary: 當Mechtild von Regenstein於大約1228年出生時，她的父親Graf Ulirch I von Regenstein39歲，母親Lukard von Lohra30歲。她於1253年與Heinrich II, Count Honstein結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1283年10月21日享年56歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mechtild von Regenstein于大约1228年出生时，她的父亲Graf Ulirch I von Regenstein39岁，母亲Lukard von Lohra30岁。她于1253年与Heinrich II, Count Honstein结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1283年10月21日享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Regenstein
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: habitational name from a place so named, from Middle High German rūge ‘rest’ (a variant of ruo) + stein ‘rock’.

nameMeanings.name: Mechtild
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Matilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Mechtild von Regenstein was born about 1228, her father, Graf Ulirch I von Regenstein, was 39 and her mother, Lukard von Lohra, was 30. She married Heinrich II, Count Honstein in 1253. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 21 October 1283, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mechtild von Regenstein est née environ 1228, son père, Graf Ulirch I von Regenstein, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Lukard von Lohra, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Heinrich II, Count Honstein en 1253. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 21 octobre 1283, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mechtild von Regenstein um 1228 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Graf Ulirch I von Regenstein 39 und ihre Mutter Lukard von Lohra 30. Sie hat 1253 Heinrich II, Count Honstein geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 21. Oktober 1283 im Alter von 56 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mechtild von Regenstein è nata il circa 1228, sua padre, Graf Ulirch I von Regenstein, aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Lukard von Lohra, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Heinrich II, Count Honstein nel 1253. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 21 ottobre 1283, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mechtild von Regensteinが約1228年に生まれた時，父Graf Ulirch I von Regensteinは39歳，母Lukard von Lohraは30歳であった。1253年にHeinrich II, Count Honsteinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1283年10月21日に56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mechtild von Regenstein(이)가 대략 1228년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Graf Ulirch I von Regenstein(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lukard von Lohra(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1253년 Heinrich II, Count Honstein(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1283년 10월 21일 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mechtild von Regenstein nasceu aproximadamente 1228, seu pai, Graf Ulirch I von Regenstein, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Lukard von Lohra, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Heinrich II, Count Honstein em 1253. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 21 de outubro de 1283, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mechtild von Regenstein родилась около 1228 г., её отцу по имени Graf Ulirch I von Regenstein было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Lukard von Lohra, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Heinrich II, Count Honstein в 1253 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 21 октября 1283 г. в возрасте 56 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mechtild von Regenstein nació aproximadamente 1228, su papá, Graf Ulirch I von Regenstein, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Lukard von Lohra, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Heinrich II, Count Honstein en 1253. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 21 de octubre de 1283, a la edad de 56 años.
